theScene: Hmmmm?♥ Oh, {i}hi [ThePlayerName].♥{/i} Welcome to my humble inn. Here to take me up on that job offer?
No longer trying to find your bearings, Vivian's voluptuous body doesn't seem to have quite the captivating effect on you it was earlier, but her huge breasts are still very eyecatching.
Uhm no, I was just seeing what the inn had to offer. Other than the job.
She gives you a sultry pout and sighs, leaning on her podium, making her heavy chest create a tempting valley that threatens to draw in your eyes' entire focus.
Well cutie, adventurers like you can sleep here free of charge thanks to the guild. Just be sure to lock your door if you don't want a monster girl to wander in and keep you company.♪
She laughs playfully, but you can't tell if she's actually joking...

Basic food and drink is also provided free of charge as well, I promise it's still the best in town despite its simplicity. But if you want anything fancy, you're going to need to pay like everyone else.
Of course, I'm fully capable of teaching you a skill or two that I'm sure will help you {i}enjoy{/i} yourself more while adventuring. Or at the very least make a monster girl fall for you.♥

Vivian stands straight again with a teasing smile, making her chest bounce slightly, drawing your eyes briefly to the glimmering pendant hovering just above her cleavage before you look her in the eyes again.
Let me know if you have any questions {i}hero{/i}, I'd love to help you out in any way I can.♥
Her cheerful and seductive smile slips a little as she thinks of something else.

Oh, and just so you know, the tavern gets {i}very{/i} full at night, so don't expect amazing service or a quiet meal until the next morning. My monster girl clientele takes up a lot of service. Though we should always be able to get you a fresh meal before you head out on an adventure.
So don't worry too much about missing dinner, we also have room service. Just not for anything extravagant.
